name: Mathlib4 Fixture Corpus
description: A small, hand-built, topically-clustered fixture corpus used by tests/unit_tests/logic/hammers/test_learned_selector.py and benchmarks/bench_itp_hammer_premise_selection.py (HAMMER-005) for reproducible held-out premise-selection recall/latency comparisons. Not a real excerpt of Mathlib4 -- statements are simplified/synthetic but follow real Lean4 naming and import conventions.

theorems.statement: theorem add_comm : forall a b : Nat, Nat.add a b = Nat.add b a
theorem add_assoc : forall a b c : Nat, Nat.add (Nat.add a b) c = Nat.add a (Nat.add b c)
theorem add_zero : forall a : Nat, Nat.add a Nat.zero = a
theorem mul_comm : forall a b : Nat, Nat.mul a b = Nat.mul b a
theorem mul_add : forall a b c : Nat, Nat.mul a (Nat.add b c) = Nat.add (Nat.mul a b) (Nat.mul a c)
theorem append_nil : forall xs : List Nat, List.append xs List.nil = xs
theorem append_assoc : forall xs ys zs : List Nat, List.append (List.append xs ys) zs = List.append xs (List.append ys zs)
theorem length_append : forall xs ys : List Nat, List.length (List.append xs ys) = Nat.add (List.length xs) (List.length ys)
theorem reverse_append : forall xs ys : List Nat, List.reverse (List.append xs ys) = List.append (List.reverse ys) (List.reverse xs)
theorem map_append : forall f xs ys, List.map f (List.append xs ys) = List.append (List.map f xs) (List.map f ys)
theorem union_comm : forall a b : Set Nat, Set.union a b = Set.union b a
theorem inter_comm : forall a b : Set Nat, Set.inter a b = Set.inter b a
theorem union_assoc : forall a b c : Set Nat, Set.union (Set.union a b) c = Set.union a (Set.union b c)
theorem subset_union_left : forall a b : Set Nat, Set.subset a (Set.union a b)
theorem mul_left_inv : forall a : Group, Group.mul (Group.inv a) a = Group.one
theorem mul_one : forall a : Group, Group.mul a Group.one = a
theorem inv_inv : forall a : Group, Group.inv (Group.inv a) = a
theorem mul_assoc : forall a b c : Group, Group.mul (Group.mul a b) c = Group.mul a (Group.mul b c)
theorem le_refl : forall a : Order, Order.le a a
theorem le_trans : forall a b c : Order, Order.le a b -> Order.le b c -> Order.le a c
